name: agent-dashboard
description: Lightweight local agent dashboard with model selector

scripts.test: node tests/safety-layer.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/review-blockers.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/persistence-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/tracing-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/websocket-events.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/demo-mode.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/metrics-api.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/task-queue.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/webhooks.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/bb-mcp-opt-in.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/system-services.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/functional-health.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/e2e-chat.js
scripts.test:unit: node tests/safety-layer.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/review-blockers.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/persistence-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/tracing-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/websocket-events.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/demo-mode.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/metrics-api.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/task-queue.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/webhooks.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/bb-mcp-opt-in.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/system-services.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --input-type=module -e "import { rmSync, mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; rmSync('.v8-coverage', { recursive: true, force: true }); mkdirSync('.v8-coverage', { recursive: true });" && node --input-type=module -e "import { spawnSync } from 'node:child_process'; const npmCmd = process.platform === 'win32' ? 'npm.cmd' : 'npm'; const result = spawnSync(npmCmd, ['run', 'test:unit'], { stdio: 'inherit', env: { ...process.env, NODE_V8_COVERAGE: '.v8-coverage' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);" && c8 report --temp-directory=.v8-coverage --reporter=text --reporter=lcov
